scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,web -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @quizstrike/shared" "npm run dev -w @quizstrike/server" "npm run dev -w @quizstrike/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @quizstrike/shared && npm run build -w @quizstrike/server && npm run build -w @quizstrike/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @quizstrike/shared && npm run build -w @quizstrike/shared && npm run typecheck -w @quizstrike/server && npm run typecheck -w @quizstrike/web
